DEFENDANTS TO PAY PLAINTIFF THE AMOUNT OF $2800.00, ALLOCATED AS FOLLOWS: $700 - TO BRITTANY HAY; 700 - TO SHAREESE SAMUEL, AND THE BALANCE OF THE AMOUNT TO RUBY LEWIS; NO BEARING ON CLAIM TO LINDA MARSHALL. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE TO ALL IN THE COMPLAINT. THE AMOUNT IS $2800 OR $2700 W/O PETITION TO COMPROMISE MINOR'S CLAIM. (SEE RECORDS FOR DETAILS).
